videos.headline: UCF pulls off Hail Mary touchdown on stroke of halftime
videos.description: Dylan Rizk airs one out and Randy Pittman Jr. makes the catch for a UCF touchdown to end the second quarter vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UCF pulls off Hail Mary touchdown on stroke of halftime) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jacurri Brown runs in UCF TD
videos.description: Jacurri Brown finds the lane to run in a touchdown for UCF vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jacurri Brown runs in UCF TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: UCF punish Arizona fumble with TD
videos.description: UCF's Ethan Barr recovers a fumble that RJ Harvey turns into a touchdown on the next play vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UCF punish Arizona fumble with TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: UCF'S RJ Harvey evades tackles for 2nd TD of game
videos.description: RJ Harvey dodges tackles to run in his second touchdown of the game for UCF vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UCF'S RJ Harvey evades tackles for 2nd TD of game) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Myles Montgomery punches in UCF TD
videos.description: Myles Montgomery plows through to the end zone to pad UCF's lead vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Myles Montgomery punches in UCF TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Noah Fifita finds Sam Olson for Arizona TD
videos.description: Sam Olson makes a nice catch on a Noah Fifita pass to get a touchdown for Arizona vs. UCF.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Noah Fifita finds Sam Olson for Arizona TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: RJ Harvey runs in his third TD of the game
videos.description: RJ Harvey runs in for his third touchdown of the game for UCF vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (RJ Harvey runs in his third TD of the game) 2024/11/02 ESHEET
